queries.natural_language: List the city names and their populations for cities located in states that also have cities with a GDP greater than 500.
queries.sql: SELECT city_name, population FROM city WHERE state_name IN (SELECT state_name FROM city WHERE gdp > '500');

queries.natural_language: Find the names of NBA players who play for a team located in a city with a population greater than 1 million.
queries.sql: SELECT N.name FROM nba AS N JOIN team AS T ON N.team = T.team_name JOIN city AS C ON T.location = C.city_name WHERE CAST(REPLACE(C.population, ',', '') AS INTEGER) > 1000000;

queries.natural_language: What are the song titles released before 2010 and after 1990 that originate from countries other than the United States?
queries.sql: SELECT song_title FROM music WHERE strftime('%Y', release_date) BETWEEN '1990' AND '2010' AND country_of_origin != 'United States';

queries.natural_language: Find the average age of NBA owners whose teams have won more than 5 championships.
queries.sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(O.age AS REAL)) FROM owner AS O JOIN team AS T ON O.nba_team = T.team_name WHERE CAST(T.championship AS INTEGER) > 5;

queries.natural_language: List the names of players who have 'None' as their sport in the Players table but are also listed as NBA players with at least one MVP award.
queries.sql: SELECT P.full_name FROM players AS P JOIN nba AS N ON P.full_name = N.name WHERE P.sport = 'None' AND N.mvp_awards != 'None';

queries.natural_language: Show the movie titles and their release years where the director also directed a movie released before the year 2000.
queries.sql: SELECT title, release_year FROM movie WHERE director IN (SELECT director FROM movie WHERE CAST(release_year AS INTEGER) < 2000);

queries.natural_language: Find the cities where a basketball team is located that was founded before 1970 and has won more than 10 championships.
queries.sql: SELECT T.location FROM team AS T WHERE CAST(T.founded_year AS INTEGER) < 1970 AND CAST(T.championship AS INTEGER) > 10;

queries.natural_language: Find the average GDP of cities that have an area greater than 500 and a population greater than 500000.
queries.sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(REPLACE(gdp, ',', '') AS REAL)) FROM city WHERE CAST(REPLACE(area, ',', '') AS REAL) > 500 AND CAST(REPLACE(population, ',', '') AS REAL) > 500000;

queries.natural_language: What are the names of players born after 1990 who play for a team whose owner is older than 65?
queries.sql: SELECT N.name FROM nba AS N JOIN owner AS O ON N.team = O.nba_team WHERE SUBSTR(N.birth_date, 1, 4) > '1990' AND CAST(O.age AS INTEGER) > 65;

queries.natural_language: List the team names founded before 1970 that have either 'LLC' or 'Inc' in their ownership name.
queries.sql: SELECT team_name FROM team WHERE founded_year < '1970' AND (ownership LIKE '%LLC%' OR ownership LIKE '%Inc%');

queries.natural_language: Find the names of NBA players who won an olympic gold medal and have also won at least one MVP award.
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM nba WHERE olympic_gold_medals != 'None' AND mvp_awards != 'None';

queries.natural_language: List all the songs that have titles that are also movie titles.
queries.sql: SELECT song_title FROM music WHERE song_title IN (SELECT title FROM movie);

queries.natural_language: Which players have a nationality that is also the nationality of an NBA owner?
queries.sql: SELECT full_name FROM players WHERE nationality IN (SELECT nationality FROM owner);

queries.natural_language: Find the average age of NBA players who play for a team owned by someone with Taiwanese-Canadian nationality.
queries.sql: SELECT AVG(CAST(N.age AS REAL)) FROM nba AS N JOIN owner AS O ON N.team = O.nba_team WHERE O.nationality = 'Taiwanese-Canadian';

queries.natural_language: List the names of owners who own a team located in a city with a population greater than 500000 and an area greater than 100.
queries.sql: SELECT O.name FROM owner AS O JOIN team AS T ON O.nba_team = T.team_name JOIN city AS C ON T.location = C.city_name WHERE CAST(C.population AS INTEGER) > 500000 AND CAST(C.area AS REAL) > 100;

queries.natural_language: Show the name and team of NBA players whose nationality is American and were drafted before 2015.
queries.sql: SELECT name, team FROM nba WHERE nationality = 'American' AND draft_year < '2015';

queries.natural_language: Find the movies that were released in a year which is also the founded year of a basketball team.
queries.sql: SELECT title FROM movie WHERE release_year IN (SELECT founded_year FROM team);
result_rows: View of the World from 9th Avenue, A Parochial New Yorker's View of the World, A New Yorker's View of the World, View of the World

The Good, the Bad and the Ugly

queries.natural_language: What are the names and ages of the NBA players who have won more than zero MVP awards and also participated in a FIBA World Cup?
queries.sql: SELECT name, age FROM nba WHERE mvp_awards > '0' AND fiba_world_cup != 'None';

queries.natural_language: Find the countries of origin for music where the artist name is also a player's full name.
queries.sql: SELECT DISTINCT country_of_origin FROM music WHERE artist_name IN (SELECT full_name FROM players);

queries.natural_language: List the location of teams that were founded after 1950 and have won either zero or more than 10 championships.
queries.sql: SELECT location FROM team WHERE founded_year > '1950' AND (championship = '0' OR championship > '10');
